extensionDescription.message: A no-fuss way to save and restore batches of tabs as bookmarks.

confirmDialogTooltip.message: If you change your mind, you can turn this confirmation on again in the options.

noMatchingItemsFound.message:
No matching items were found. Your item may have been deleted on
 another computer, or outside of Tab Stash entirely.

noDeletedItemsYet.message: It doesn't look like you've deleted anything on this computer yet.

notFoundHelpText.message:
Didn't find what you're looking for? It may have been deleted on
 another computer, or outside of Tab Stash entirely.

toolbarButtonClickLabel.message: When the toolbar button is clicked:

showStashInSidebarOption.message: show the stash in the sidebar

showStashInTabOption.message: show the stash in a tab

showStashInPopupOption.message: show the stash in a popup

contextMenuStashLabel.message: When stashing tabs from the context menu or address bar:

showStashInSidebarRadio.message: Show the stash in the sidebar

showStashInTabRadio.message: Show the stash in a tab

appendTooltip.message: If the top-most group has a name, or is older than this, a new, unnamed group will be created instead.

appendToTopGroupLabel.message: Append to the top-most group only if it was created in the last

showOpenTabsTooltip.message:
`Click on the "Open Tabs" or `
 + `"Unstashed Tabs" title to toggle between these `
 + `options. Note that pinned tabs are never shown.`

deletingItemsLabel.message: When deleting items from your stash:

rememberDeletedItemsLabel.message: Remember items that were deleted on this computer for

onceStashedLabel.message: Once a tab has been stashed:

hideTooltip.message: Hidden tabs that are still loaded can be restored instantly. They also preserve anything you had entered into the tab and its history (e.g. Back button).

hideKeepLoadedOption.message: Hide the tab and keep it loaded in the background

autodiscardTooltip.message: Monitors the total number of tabs in your browser, and if you have a lot of tabs open, unloads hidden tabs that haven't been used recently. This option significantly reduces memory usage and is recommended for most users.

autodiscardOption.message:
Automatically unload hidden tabs that haven't been used in a
 while

checkIntervalLabel.message: Check for old hidden tabs every

tabsText.message: hidden and visible tabs loaded at all times

keepOldestTabsLabel.message: hidden and visible tabs loaded at all times

unloadTabsLabel.message: ...unload tabs more aggressively if there are more than

hideUnloadTooltip.message: Hidden tabs that are unloaded can be restored very quickly, and usually without a network connection. They also preserve browsing history (e.g. Back button). However, depending on the website, you may lose anything you had entered into the tab that isn't already saved. Uses less memory.

hideUnloadOption.message: Hide the tab and immediately unload it

closeTooltip.message: Uses the least amount of memory and takes the longest to restore, because tab contents may need to be fetched over the network. This option will cause the browser to forget anything you had entered into the tab, as well as the tab's browsing history (e.g. Back button).

openingTabsLabel.message: When opening tabs from the stash:

loadLazilyOption.message: Wait for a tab to be selected before loading it

confirmCloseTabsOption.message: Confirm when closing a lot of open tabs

warningTooltip.message:
Turning on experimental features may break Tab Stash
 or cause data loss! They are "experimental" because they are still in
 development and/or there may be known issues. Experimental features
 may change significantly or be removed entirely in future
 versions.

feedbackText.message:
To provide feedback or report a problem with a feature, leave a
 comment on the issue linked in [brackets] below.

restoreClosedTabsTooltip.message:
When restoring tabs, if a hidden tab isn't available, search for and
 re-open recently-closed tabs with matching URLs. (NOTE: This is known to
 occasionally restore incorrect tabs on certain versions of Firefox,
 check the linked issue for more details.)

importInstructions.message:
Paste anything containing links or URLs here. Links and URLs will be
 extracted and converted into bookmarks in your stash.

splitTabsLabel.message: Split tabs into different groups on:

fetchIconsAndTitles.message: Fetch icons and titles from each site

openAndDeleteTitle.message: Open tabs and delete them from the stash

deleteOrCloseTitle.message: Delete stashed tabs and close unstashed tabs
